preferred_skills: Server-Side Rendering and Static Site Generation
responsibilities: Build responsive, accessible, and performant user interfaces using React or Vue.js that render correctly across all major browsers and devices
Implement pixel-perfect UI components from Figma designs with strict adherence to design system tokens and brand guidelines
Manage complex client-side application state using Redux, Zustand, or Context API to ensure predictable and debuggable data flows
Optimize frontend bundle size, render performance, and Core Web Vitals scores to meet sub-2-second load time targets
Integrate with backend RESTful and GraphQL APIs, handling loading states, error boundaries, and data caching gracefully
Write unit and end-to-end tests using Jest and Cypress to maintain high coverage and prevent UI regressions
Develop reusable, documented component libraries in Storybook to accelerate cross-team UI development
Implement WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility standards across all UI components to ensure inclusive user experiences
Collaborate with UX designers and backend engineers in sprint ceremonies to refine requirements and deliver features iteratively
Conduct frontend code reviews and establish coding standards, lint rules, and architectural patterns for the web team
